elements.original_description: A simplified human brain with glowing blue and orange neural connections, surrounded by small icons of clocks, coins, and shopping carts. The brain is centered on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A highly detailed 2D minimalist illustration of a simplified human brain at the center, with glowing blue and orange neural connections branching out. Surrounding the brain are small, clean flat vector icons: clocks, coins, and shopping carts, arranged aesthetically on a pure white background. Professional 2D icon style, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks, reflecting a conceptual and clear visual tone.
